title: hesperis juncea
intro: Hesperis juncea, also known as Chinese Rocket or Chinese Evening Primrose, is a type of flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving liver function. Hesperis juncea can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
